name: common-thread
description: Methodology and reference implementation for sockpuppet attribution from public behavioral signals on social platforms.

scripts.deploy:all:dev: npm run deploy:backend:dev && npm run deploy:web:dev
scripts.deploy:all:prod: npm run deploy:backend:prod && npm run deploy:web:prod
scripts.db:create:prod: wrangler d1 create common-thread-prod --binding DB --env production --update-config
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply common-thread-prod --remote --env production
scripts.r2:create: wrangler r2 bucket create common-thread-archive --binding ARCHIVE --update-config
scripts.r2:create:prod: wrangler r2 bucket create common-thread-archive-prod --binding ARCHIVE --env production --update-config
